title: WeatherSampleRow
description: Raw weather sensor sample. APPEND strategy: carries edge_id (SQLite autoincrement id). Largest table; synced last/throttled.

edge_id.description: Original SQLite rowid on the edge. Server unique key is (node_id, db_epoch, edge_id).

wind_dir_code.description: Compass sector index (0-15) emitted by the edge firmware; complements wind_dir_deg.

raw_json.description: Full sensor payload, preserved for future ML.

ingest_run_id.description: Edge-side ingestion run id (NOT the sync run_id).
